tagline: Partnering With Vets to Serve Pets

hero.headline: Your Pet Deserves a Family That Cares
hero.subheadline: From wellness exams to grooming, day camp, and surgery, Pets4Life brings everything your pet needs under one roof. Dr. DeSa and our Highland Park team treat every pet like our own.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pet Care<br class="hidden md:block"> All Under One Roof
services.subtitle: No more driving across town for different pet needs. From checkups to grooming to day camp, Pets4Life handles it all with the love and expertise your pet deserves.

cards.title: Wellness Exams & Vaccines
cards.description: Thorough nose-to-tail wellness exams, vaccinations, and preventive care protocols to keep your pet healthy at every life stage.

cards.title: Surgical Services
cards.description: ACL repair, soft tissue surgery, spay/neuter, and advanced procedures performed by experienced surgeons with specialized anesthesia training.

cards.title: Dental Care
cards.description: Professional dental cleanings, digital radiography, oral surgery, and extractions to protect your pet's oral health and overall well-being.

cards.title: Diagnostics & Imaging
cards.description: On-site lab work, digital radiology, ultrasound, and dental X-rays for fast, accurate diagnoses without the wait.

cards.title: Grooming & Spa
cards.description: Full-service grooming including baths, haircuts, nail trims, ear cleaning, and brush-outs in a calm, stress-free spa environment.

cards.title: Doggy Day Camp
cards.description: Supervised socialization, exercise, and enrichment in our boutique day camp. Your dog comes home happy, tired, and well-loved.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Happier, Healthier Pets

steps.title: Book Your Appointment
steps.description: Call us, book online, or just walk in. We offer flexible scheduling including Saturdays. New patients always welcome — no referral needed.

steps.title: Meet Dr. DeSa & Our Team
steps.description: Our bilingual veterinary team performs a comprehensive evaluation, explains every finding clearly, and creates a personalized care plan for your pet.

steps.title: Enjoy Peace of Mind
steps.description: With wellness, surgery, grooming, day camp, and telehealth all under one roof, your pet's health is covered. We become your pet's second family.

about.label: Why Pet Parents Trust Us
about.headline: More Than a Vet — Your Pet's Complete Care Team
about.description: Founded by Dr. Joseph DeSa, DVM, with over a decade of veterinary experience and specialized training in anesthesia and pain management from the University of Illinois. Pets4Life is Highland Park's only all-in-one pet care destination — combining a full veterinary hospital, grooming spa, doggy day camp, retail boutique, and training programs. Our bilingual team treats every pet like family because that is exactly what they are.

features.title: Board-Certified Surgical Network
features.description: Access to affiliate board-certified surgeons for advanced procedures, right here at our facility. No outside referrals needed.

features.title: Walk-Ins Welcome, Saturdays Too
features.description: We know pet emergencies do not follow a schedule. Walk in any day including Saturday for veterinary or grooming services.

features.title: Compassionate End-of-Life Care
features.description: In-home end-of-life services and eco-friendly water cremation, providing dignity and peace for families during the hardest moments.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pet deserves quality care without hidden fees. We provide upfront pricing for all services — from wellness visits to grooming packages.

guarantee.headline: Our "Family-First" Care Promise
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any visit, we will make it right at no additional charge. Dr. DeSa and our team stand behind every exam, every procedure, and every grooming session. Your pet's health and your peace of mind are our top priorities — no exceptions.

faqs.question: Do I need an appointment or can I walk in?
faqs.answer: Both! We welcome walk-ins for veterinary and grooming services, including Saturdays. For surgical or specialty services, we recommend scheduling in advance so we can prepare everything your pet needs.

faqs.question: What makes Pets4Life different from other vets?
faqs.answer: We are the only facility in Highland Park that combines a full veterinary hospital, grooming spa, doggy day camp, retail boutique, and training under one roof. Dr. DeSa brings 10+ years of experience with specialized anesthesia training, and our bilingual team serves in English and Spanish.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency services?
faqs.answer: We handle urgent care during business hours and walk-ins are always welcome. For after-hours emergencies, we will connect you with our trusted emergency partner hospitals and can follow up with telehealth consultations the next day.

faqs.question: Can I stay with my pet during the exam?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We encourage pet parents to be present during exams. Our team explains every step clearly so you understand your pet's health and feel confident in the care plan we create together.

faqs.question: Do you offer telehealth or virtual visits?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our telehealth consultations let you connect with our veterinary team from home for non-emergency concerns, follow-up care, and quick questions. It is a convenient option for busy families or pets who stress during travel.

testimonials.name: Becca C.
testimonials.text: I truly cannot express how incredible Pets4Life is and how truly amazing Dr. DeSa is. I have never met a more compassionate vet in my life! He has provided the absolute best care for our dog!

testimonials.name: Alex V.
testimonials.text: The whole team could not be more patient, kind, and accommodating. They made the entire experience stress-free for both us and our dog.

testimonials.name: Becca C.
testimonials.text: The clinic is absolutely beautiful, and the care is above and beyond! We are so grateful to Dr. DeSa and Dr. Gabby for everything they have done for our family.

contact.headline:
Ready to Give Your Pet
the Best Care Possible?
contact.subtitle: Book an appointment or walk in today. Our Highland Park team is ready to welcome you and your pet with open arms — in English or Spanish.
benefits: Comprehensive wellness exam for new patients
